title: An Empirical Study of Autoregressive Pre-Training from Videos
title_zh: 自回归视频预训练的实证研究
abstract: We empirically study autoregressive pre-training from unlabeled videos. To perform our study, we construct a series of autoregressive video models, called Toto. We treat videos as sequences of visual tokens and train transformer models to autoregressively predict future tokens. Our models are pretrained on a diverse dataset of unlabeled videos and images comprising over 1 trillion visual tokens. We explore different architectural, training, and inference design choices. We evaluate the learned visual representations on a range of downstream tasks including image recognition, video classification, object tracking, and robotic manipulation. Our result demonstrate that, despite minimal inductive biases, autoregressive video pre-training leads to competitive performance across all benchmarks. Finally, we find that scaling our video models results in similar scaling curves to those seen in language models, albeit with a different rate. https://brjathu.github.io/toto.
abstract_zh: 我们通过实验研究了从无标签视频中进行自回归预训练的方法。为了开展研究，我们构建了一系列自回归视频模型，称为Toto。我们将视频视为视觉标记序列，并训练Transformer模型来自回归地预测未来的标记。我们的模型在包含超过1万亿视觉标记的多样化无标签视频和图像数据集上进行了预训练。我们探索了不同的架构、训练和推理设计选择。我们在包括图像识别、视频分类、目标跟踪和机器人操作等一系列下游任务上评估了学习到的视觉表示。结果表明，尽管归纳偏置极小，自回归视频预训练在所有基准测试中均取得了有竞争力的性能。最后，我们发现扩展视频模型会产生与语言模型相似的扩展曲线，尽管速率不同。
tldr_zh: 自回归视频预训练在多种下游任务上表现优异，扩展曲线与语言模型类似。
cover_zh: 视频也能像语言一样自回归预训练？Toto模型表现惊艳！
